flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Johnston Community College rose 50% between 2016 and 2019 ($6.0k → $9.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Johnston Community College fell 30% between 2006 and 2009 (48.3% → 34.1%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 8 pp at Johnston Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (28.8% vs 37.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Johnston Community College rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7k → 3.5k).
